Q6 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

The loop transfer function of a system has a pole in the right half of the s-plane. The Nyquist plot makes one clockwise encirclement of the (–1, 0) point. The number of poles of the closed loop system in RHP is _______.

NAT
Correct answer: 2
Solution

2 (2 - 2)

Q7 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

The system shown in figure is a unity feedback control system with a minor rate feedback loop. In the absence of rate feedback (α = 0), the peak overshoot of the system to unit step input in percentage is _______. (correct to one decimal place)

NAT
Correct answer: 16.3
Solution

16.3 (15.8 - 16.9)

Q8 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

The number of encirclements N of the origin for the given figure is _____

NAT
Correct answer: 3
Solution

3 (3 - 3)

Beginning at the point α, we rotate a radial line from the origin to the contour in the direction of arrows. Three counter clockwise rotation of 360° results in the radial line returning to the point α. Hence, N = 3.
